steps.title: Identify the antecedent and required form
steps.content: The blank needs a possessive pronoun to modify “methodology”. The antecedent “the technique” is singular.

steps.title: Apply the agreement rule
steps.content: ”its” is the singular possessive form that agrees with “the technique”. The other choices fail because they're contractions (they're = they are; it's = it is) or don't match the singular antecedent (their is plural). That matches choice B — B is correct.
